metadata.title: Agenflow — AI software, specialized by vertical
metadata.description: We audit your operations, automate the repetitive, and build the software your sector needs.

hero.title: AI software for sectors that still run by hand.
hero.subtitle: We audit your operations, automate the repetitive, and build the software your sector needs. We start in weeks, not months.

about.title: We build AI software, specialized by vertical.
about.body: Agenflow enters every client through consulting and automation, and builds the product their sector needs. Growing without systems isn't scaling — it's just a scheduled collapse.

services.title: What we do

items.name: AI consulting & automation
items.desc: We audit your operations and propose a concrete solution. The way in.

items.name: Automation + AI for SMEs
items.desc: We remove repetitive manual work with automation and AI.

items.name: Custom software development
items.desc: We build SaaS and custom software tailored to your sector.

services.complementary: Complementary service: modernizing your online presence.

items.name: Legal
items.desc: Software and automation for law firms, alongside a partner firm.

items.name: Real estate & construction
items.desc: fincai for property managers and replo for real estate agencies. Next: renovations, installers and construction.

items.name: Diagnosis & audit
items.desc: We find where you lose time and money.

items.name: Solution architecture
items.desc: We show you the blueprint before building.

pricing.title: How we work
pricing.subtitle: By packages, based on your starting point. A tailored quote after the diagnosis.

trust.title: Why teams trust us
trust.body: We work with a partner law firm and build real products like fincai and replo. Clear method, test environments and data security. Results in weeks, not months.

finalCta.title: Request a diagnosis of your operations
finalCta.subtitle: We tell you what to automate and how — no strings attached.

items.a: We build AI software specialized by vertical and automate processes in SMEs, starting with a consultation.

items.q: How soon will I see results?
items.a: We work in weeks, not months. The initial diagnosis is fast.

items.q: Which sectors do you work with?
items.a: Legal and real estate/construction are our sectors, plus automation for SMEs in general.

servicesHub.title: Services
servicesHub.subtitle: From audit to software. Three ways to work with you, one logic: remove manual work and build what your business needs.

consultoria.title: AI consulting & automation
consultoria.intro: We audit your operations, find where you lose time and money, and hand you a clear plan of what to automate and how. The way into everything else.

automatizacion.title: Automation + AI for SMEs
automatizacion.intro: We remove repetitive manual work by connecting your tools and applying AI where it helps. Results in weeks, not months.
points: Integration of your tools and data
AI agents over documents and unstructured data
Processes that run on their own, with oversight

desarrollo.title: Custom software development
desarrollo.intro: When automation isn't enough, we build the software. SaaS and tools tailored to your sector, with AI at the core.
points: Custom product, from architecture to deployment
Integrated AI (Claude/GPT) where it adds value

presenciaOnline.title: Online presence modernization
presenciaOnline.intro: Has your website or digital presence fallen behind? We update and modernize it. A simple first step before automating.

sectorsHub.title: Sectors
sectorsHub.subtitle: We build software specialized by vertical. These are the sectors we already work in.

legal.title: Legal
legal.intro: Software and automation for law firms, alongside a partner law firm that co-defines the solutions with us.
points: AI agents over case files and data
Solutions validated with a partner firm

realEstate.title: Real estate & construction
realEstate.intro: We develop software for property managers and real estate agencies, with an eye on renovations, installers and construction.

products.fincai: AI software so property managers can run their communities far better. Finc, its AI agent, orchestrates everything.
products.replo: Lead management for real estate agencies: omnichannel inbox, WhatsApp agent, voice and visit scheduling.

pricingPage.title: Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: We work in packages based on your starting point. Tell us your case and we'll send you a tailored quote.
pricingPage.note: No fixed prices: every project is different. We give you a clear quote after the diagnosis.

packages.name: Operations diagnosis
packages.desc: We audit your operations and hand you a plan of what to automate and how. The entry point.

packages.name: Automation + AI sprint
packages.desc: Scoped implementation: we connect tools and apply AI to remove manual work.

packages.name: Software / product development
packages.desc: We build software tailored to your sector, with AI at the core.

packages.name: Support & optimization
packages.desc: Ongoing support: monitoring, improvements and new automations.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.intro: Agenflow exists to bring AI and automation to sectors that still run by hand, and to build the software they need.
aboutPage.body: We work with sector partners — like a law firm in legal — to build products that truly fit, and we develop our own vertical SaaS like fincai and replo.
aboutPage.expertBody: You won't get a salesperson: you'll get the person who will design your solution.

contactPage.title: Let's talk about your operations
contactPage.body: Tell us what you want to improve and we'll suggest where to start.

form.name: Name
form.message: What do you want to improve?
form.success: Thanks! We'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: Couldn't send. Try again or email us.

errors.name: Enter your name.
errors.message: Tell us a bit more (min. 10 characters).
